message.content:
@startuml
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam roundcorner 10
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classBackgroundColor #F3F3F3
skinparam classBorderColor #666666
skinparam classFontColor #111111

hide methods

class Artist << (E,#B7D7B7) >> {
  • id : VARCHAR
  --
  name : VARCHAR
  instagram : VARCHAR
  facebook : VARCHAR
  twitter : VARCHAR
  wikipedia : VARCHAR
  bio : TEXT
}

class Album << (E,#B7D7B7) >> {
  • id : VARCHAR
  --
  • title : VARCHAR
  • release : VARCHAR
  • image : VARCHAR
}

class Song << (E,#B7D7B7) >> {
  • id : VARCHAR
  --
  • album_id : VARCHAR
  • title : VARCHAR
  • duration : INT
}

class PlaylistCategory << (E,#B7D7B7) >> {
  • id : VARCHAR
  --
  • name : VARCHAR
  • image : VARCHAR
  • icon : VARCHAR
}

class Playlist << (E,#B7D7B7) >> {
  • id : VARCHAR
  --
  • name : VARCHAR
  description : TEXT
  image : VARCHAR
  category_id : VARCHAR
  • user_id : VARCHAR
}

class PodcastCategory << (E,#B7D7B7) >> {
  • id : VARCHAR
  --
  • name : VARCHAR
  • image : VARCHAR
  • icon : VARCHAR
}

class Podcast << (E,#B7D7B7) >> {
  • id : VARCHAR
  --
  --
  • name : VARCHAR
  about : TEXT
  image : VARCHAR
  category_id : VARCHAR
  • user_id : VARCHAR
}

class Episode << (E,#B7D7B7) >> {
  • id : VARCHAR
  --
  • podcast_id : VARCHAR
  • title : VARCHAR
  description : TEXT
  published_at : DATE
  duration : INT
}

class User << (E,#B7D7B7) >> {
}

class Concert << (E,#B7D7B7) >> {
}

' Layout similar to the image (no relationships shown)
Artist -[hidden]right- Album
Album -[hidden]right- Song
Song -[hidden]right- PlaylistCategory

Artist -[hidden]down- Playlist
Playlist -[hidden]right- PodcastCategory
PodcastCategory -[hidden]right- Podcast
Podcast -[hidden]right- Episode

Playlist -[hidden]down- User
User -[hidden]right- Concert
@enduml
